title: bumelia neglecta
intro: Bumelia neglecta, also known as the Yellow Bumelia or False Elder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bumelia neglecta include treating fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from digestive problems. Bumelia neglecta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its health benefits.
